parameters.query: SELECT c.id as casoid, a.nome as animalnome, h.nome as tutornome FROM casos c JOIN animais a ON c.animal_id = a.id JOIN humanos h ON c.humano_id = h.id WHERE c.telegram_channel_id = '{{ $json.chatid }}' LIMIT 1
SELECT historico FROM conversas_telegram WHERE chat_id = '{{ $('Avalia estado Vanessa').first().json.chatid }}' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO conversas_telegram (chat_id, historico, last_message, last_message_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.chatid }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.historico).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.texto.substring(0,200).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET historico = EXCLUDED.historico, last_message = EXCLUDED.last_message, last_message_at = EXCLUDED.last_message_at, updated_at = NOW()
